cedict_en: abbr. for 中國共產黨|中国共产党[Zhong1 guo2 Gong4 chan3 dang3], Chinese Communist Party
(literary) hard; firm; strong/exactly; precisely/barely; only just/just; only a short while ago
many; quite a few; a good number of
to push (e.g. for acceptance of a plan); to promote; to give impetus to
surname Wang | king or monarch/best or strongest of its type/grand/great | (literary) (of a monarch) to reign over (a kingdom)
